description_long: This is a large, stately house surrounded by a semi-circular arrangement of lush trees, some of which have purple blossoms. The house features a prominent central entrance with an arched portico, flanked by two wings, and a spacious driveway leading to a multi-car garage. The structure is primarily white with dark roofing, and the windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows across the facade. The landscaping is manicured, with the trees forming a natural privacy barrier around the property. The roofline is varied, with both flat and gabled sections, and multiple chimneys are visible. The overall appearance suggests a blend of traditional and modern residential architectural elements.
description: A large, elegant white house with a multi-car garage, symmetrical windows, and a semi-circular border of flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched portico, driveway, and garage, framed by a curved line of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and the dense tree border wrapping around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full arc of surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, rear landscaping, and the continuation of the tree border.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched portico with steps, double doors, and a covered entry flanked by columns
